introSection: Zyklon was a steel roller coaster which operated at Olympic Park and later at Lakeview Park.

sections.title: History
sections.content: It isn't known specifically when this coaster opened at Olympic Park, but it was mentioned in a trip report from 1976. While at Olympic Park, it was called Cyclone. Olympic Park closed in 1982, with its attractions auctioned off on October 16 of that year. The ride was sold to Lakeview Park, where it opened in 1983.

fullText:
Zyklon was a steel roller coaster which operated at Olympic Park and later at Lakeview Park.

It isn't known specifically when this coaster opened at Olympic Park, but it was mentioned in a trip report from 1976. While at Olympic Park, it was called Cyclone. Olympic Park closed in 1982, with its attractions auctioned off on October 16 of that year. The ride was sold to Lakeview Park, where it opened in 1983.
